targets.rawSql: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.status, c.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(c.assignee,''),'—') AS owner, c.created_at, DATEDIFF(NOW(), c.created_at) AS age_days, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks') AS tracked, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) IN (SELECT id FROM hq.issues WHERE status IN ('closed','completed'))) AS done, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) IN (SELECT id FROM hq.issues WHERE status = 'in_progress')) AS active, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1) ORDER BY 1 SEPARATOR ', ') FROM hq.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = c.id AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:%') AS rigs FROM hq.issues c WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.status IN ('open','in_progress','staged_ready') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, c.priority ASC, c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id AS convoy, LEFT(c.title, 40) AS convoy_title, c.status AS convoy_status, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1) AS rig, SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) AS epic_id, i.title AS epic_title, i.status AS epic_status, i.priority FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' AND i.issue_type = 'epic' UNION ALL SELECT c.id, LEFT(c.title, 40), c.status, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1), i.title, i.status, i.priority FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' AND i.issue_type = 'epic' UNION ALL SELECT c.id, LEFT(c.title, 40), c.status, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1), i.title, i.status, i.priority FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id JOIN optuna.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:optuna:%' AND i.issue_type = 'epic' UNION ALL SELECT c.id, LEFT(c.title, 40), c.status, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1), i.title, i.status, i.priority FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' AND i.issue_type = 'epic' UNION ALL SELECT c.id, LEFT(c.title, 40), c.status, SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1), SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1), i.title, i.status, i.priority FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id JOIN node0.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:node0:%' AND i.issue_type = 'epic' ORDER BY convoy_status, priority ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM hq.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' AND status NOT IN ('closed','completed')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM hq.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' AND status IN ('closed','completed') AND updated_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM hq.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' AND status NOT IN ('closed','completed') AND updated_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND c.status NOT IN ('closed','completed') AND d.type = 'tracks'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(NOW(), created_at)), 1) AS value FROM hq.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' AND status NOT IN ('closed','completed')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', 2), ':', -1)) AS value FROM hq.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id WHERE c.issue_type = 'convoy' AND c.status NOT IN ('closed','completed') AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:%'

list.name: database
list.label: Rig Database
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT TABLE_SCHEMA AS __value, TABLE_SCHEMA AS __text FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'issues' ORDER BY TABLE_SCHEMA
